message:
fix(tui): resolve clippy warnings and fix pre-existing test failures (ft-3hbv9)

- Remove unnecessary .clone() on Copy type StyleSpec in dashboard panels
- Use .values() instead of .iter() on BTreeMap in adapt_dashboard()
- Change health_tier_style() param from &SystemHealthTier to SystemHealthTier (Copy)
- Fix sample_search fixture rank 3.15 vs test assertion 3.14 mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
